mapper.select: SELECT s.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code, s.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM STUDENT s WHERE s.STUDENT_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT SET PARENT_LINK_CODE = #{parentLinkCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code, s.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM STUDENT s WHERE s.PARENT_LINK_CODE = #{parentLinkCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_PARENT WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND LINK_STATUS = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_PARENT ( LINK_ID, STUDENT_ID, PARENT_ID, LINK_STATUS, RELATION_TYPE, LINKED_AT, UNLINKED_AT ) VALUES ( student_parent_seq.NEXTVAL, #{studentId}, #{parentId}, 1, #{relationType}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp INNER JOIN STUDENT s ON sp.STUDENT_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE sp.PARENT_ID = #{parentMemberId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY sp.LINKED_AT DESC

SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS parent_name, m.EMAIL AS email FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp INNER JOIN PARENT p ON sp.PARENT_ID = p.PARENT_ID INNER JOIN MEMBER m ON sp.PARENT_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE sp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY sp.LINKED_AT DESC

SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at,
s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code,
NVL(c.YEAR, 0) AS class_year, NVL(c.GRADE, 0) AS class_grade, NVL(c.CLASS_NO, 0) AS class_no_alias, c.CLASS_NAME AS class_name_alias,
'선생님 코멘트 없음' AS teacher_comment, 0 AS total_learning_count, 0 AS completed_learning_count, 0 AS learning_progress_rate, 0 AS total_assignment_count, 0 AS submitted_assignment_count, 0 AS assignment_rate, 0 AS unconfirmed_notice_count
FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp JOIN STUDENT s ON sp.STUDENT_ID = s.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN STUDENT_CLASS sc ON s.STUDENT_ID = sc.STUDENT_ID AND sc.END_DATE IS NULL
AND sc.CLASS_ID = #{classId}
LEFT JOIN CLASS c ON sc.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID
WHERE sp.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND sp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT DISTINCT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, NVL(C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN, 0) AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN CLASS C ON C.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SP.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY C.YEAR DESC, C.GRADE DESC, C.CLASS_NO DESC, C.CLASS_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_PARENT SET LINK_STATUS = 1, LINKED_AT = SYSDATE, UNLINKED_AT = NULL WHERE LINK_ID = ( SELECT MAX(LINK_ID) FROM STUDENT_PARENT WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} ) AND LINK_STATUS = 0
UPDATE STUDENT_PARENT SET LINK_STATUS = 0, UNLINKED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND LINK_STATUS = 1
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'STUDENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS name, s.BIRTH AS birth, s.GENDER AS gender, s.INTRO AS intro, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN STUDENT s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'PARENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS name, p.BIRTH AS birth, p.GENDER AS gender, p.INTRO AS intro, p.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN PARENT p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.PARENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'TEACHER' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, t.TEACHER_NAME AS name, t.BIRTH AS birth, t.GENDER AS gender, t.INTRO AS intro, t.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN TEACHER t ON m.MEMBER_ID = t.TEACHER_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT SET STUDENT_NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIRTH = #{birth, jdbcType=DATE}, GENDER = #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTRO = #{intro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profile_image, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{member_id, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE PARENT SET PARENT_NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIRTH = #{birth, jdbcType=DATE}, GENDER = #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTRO = #{intro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profile_image, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE PARENT_ID = #{member_id, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE TEACHER SET TEACHER_NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIRTH = #{birth, jdbcType=DATE}, GENDER = #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTRO = #{intro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profile_image, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE TEACHER_ID = #{member_id, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, s.PHONE AS phone, 'STUDENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS name, s.BIRTH AS birth, s.GENDER AS gender, s.INTRO AS intro, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN STUDENT s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, p.PHONE AS phone, 'PARENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS name, p.BIRTH AS birth, p.GENDER AS gender, p.INTRO AS intro, p.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN PARENT p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.PARENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, t.PHONE AS phone, 'TEACHER' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, t.TEACHER_NAME AS name, t.BIRTH AS birth, t.GENDER AS gender, t.INTRO AS intro, t.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN TEACHER t ON m.MEMBER_ID = t.TEACHER_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET EMAIL = #{email}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET PWD = #{pwd}, PWD_CHANGED_AT = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
